children.heading: Legal effect of certificates issued by the Secretary of State
children.label: a Legal effect of certificates issued by the Secretary of State

children.heading: Issuance of certificates by the Secretary of State
children.label: 1 Issuance of certificates by the Secretary of State
A
children.text: receives appropriate notification from the central authority of such child’s country of origin; and

children.label: B
children.text: has verified that the requirements of the Convention and this chapter have been met with respect to the adoption.

children.heading: Legal effect of certificates
children.label: 2 Legal effect of certificates
children.text: If appended to an original adoption decree, the certificate described in paragraph (1) shall be treated by Federal and State agencies, courts, and other public and private persons and entities as conclusive evidence of the facts certified therein and shall constitute the certification required by .section 1154(d)(2) of title 8

children.heading: Legal effect of Convention adoption finalized in another Convention country
children.label: b Legal effect of Convention adoption finalized in another Convention country
children.text: A final adoption in another Convention country, certified by the Secretary of State pursuant to subsection (a) of this section or , shall be recognized as a final valid adoption for purposes of all Federal, State, and local laws of the United States.section 14932(c) of this title

children.heading: Condition on finalization of Convention adoption by State court
children.label: c Condition on finalization of Convention adoption by State court
children.text: In the case of a child who has entered the United States from another Convention country for the purpose of adoption, an order declaring the adoption final shall not be entered unless the Secretary of State has issued the certificate provided for in subsection (a) with respect to the adoption.
